text:
Thespring 2025 menswear showswrapped up a month ago and one of the biggest trends from our male street stylers? Brooches!

While we can thank the 2024 award season and stars likeBarry Keoghan and Cillian Murphyfor popularizing the trend into the mainstream, we must remember where the brooch resurgence truly began:Pharrell Williams’s first show for Louis Vuitton. On the runway, several looks—from casual denim jackets to dressy tuxedos—were embroidered with pieces of bling.

Tonight, stars including Mick Jagger, Omar Sy, and Taika Waititi all took their cues from Williams as they attended the Prelude to the 2024 Olympic Games in Paris. And Williams, who served as a co-host of the evening’s event, made sure to sport the trend with a dazzling brooch of his own design from Louis Vuitton. See all of the best men’s brooches from the event below.

title: The Men’s Brooch Trend Isn’t Dying Down Anytime Soon, According to the Arrivals at the Prelude to the 2024 Olympic Games | Vogue
author: Irene Kim
description: Mick Jagger, Omar Sy, and Taika Waititi all partook in the brooch trend recently repopularized by designer Pharrell Williams.
